name: io.github.Braynexservices/nigeria-bank-resolve
description: Resolve a Nigerian NUBAN + bank code to the account name (Paystack, free key). PII never cached.

environmentVariables.name: BANK_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Provider selector — "mock" (default, offline fixtures) or "paystack" for live data.

environmentVariables.name: PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Paystack secret key (free at paystack.com) — required when BANK_PROVIDER=paystack.
